narrative: Australia business confidence plunges as Iran war shock hits outlook, driving AUD/USD lower at 0.709; EUR/USD holds at 1.1772 as ECB and Fed rates remain on hold. Gold higher +0.60% on safe-haven demand, while equities rise +1.02% and VIX at 19.1. USD/JPY pressured at 159.06 as JPY's safe-haven function appears compromised, with USD/CAD and USD/CHF steady near 1.378 and 0.7829 respectively.
